text: WarMonitor Putting the leader’s face on everything is a hallmark of authoritarian cult-of-personality regimes, from Stalin’s Soviet Union to North Korea’s Kim dynasty, where portraits appear on homes, schools, government buildings, posters, flags, currency, statues, and propaganda. Trump has now put his face or name on all of the following in his second term: — Passports — National Parks Passes — Trump Gold Cards — Trump class battleships — The Trump Kennedy Center for Performing Arts — TrumpRx — Trump’s signature on US paper currency — Gold coins from the Commission of Fine Arts — The Department of Justice — The Donald J Trump Institute of Peace — The Department of Labor — Trump accounts — The Department of Agriculture - Headquarters tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 将领导人的头像印在所有事物上是威权主义个人崇拜政权的标志，从斯大林的苏联到朝鲜的金氏王朝，肖像出现在住宅、学校、政府大楼、海报、旗帜、货币、雕像和宣传品上。特朗普在第二个任期内已将他的头像或名字印在以下所有事物上：— 护照 — 国家公园通行证 — 特朗普金卡 — 特朗普级战列舰 — 特朗普肯尼迪表演艺术中心 — TrumpRx — 特朗普在美国纸币上的签名 — 美术委员会发行的金币 — 司法部 — 唐纳德·J·特朗普和平研究所 — 劳工部 — 特朗普账户 — 农业部总部 推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : BREAKING 🔴 The United Arab Emirates, OPEC’s 3rd largest oil producer, announced it will leave OPEC and OPEC+ effective May 1. The move would free the UAE from cartel production quotas, allowing it to pump oil at full capacity, set its own export strategy and price crude without group restrictions. That could pave the way for higher UAE output, stronger state revenues and downward pressure on global oil prices. Lower prices and increased supply would likely be welcomed by President Trump, who has long criticized OPEC production limits and called for cheaper energy. tweet

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix You are going to appreciate this one @Mpolymer 👇 A VERY important piece today in Israel’s Ynet by Nahum Barnea & Ronen Bergman on the botched regime change plan in the Iran war. It confirms regime change was “the heart of the plan,” with Netanyahu and the Mossad driving it and Trump on board: decapitate the leadership, foment protests, and back a Kurdish incursion from the west. What stands out most is the admission of how central Israeli influence ops in Iran became. Under Mossad chief Barnea, in recent years shaping Iranian public opinion shifted to a core priority, “driving influence moves” inside Iran and effectively turning it into a “weapons system” with effects “far beyond social media.” The strategy was explicit: topple from above and below, “lean on senior officials” while “fostering mass protest and armed resistance of minorities,” in "parallel." "The organization" for this op "began four years ago," the piece states, and "reached operational maturity two and a half years ago." The piece also acknowledges “immense” Israeli work in the “background” of the January protests, which were met with a violent crackdown killing thousands by Iranian authorities, who portrayed them as foreign-backed. The regime change war was itself was advanced because of these protests. The war was originally slated for June but expedited as conditions seemed to “ripen.” Yet it didn’t bear out to say the least. No mass uprising. No collapse. The regime “restored command and control” and survived what planners evidently thought would end it within days. Even more striking, the piece says the US was caught off guard by Iran’s Hormuz closure in part because Trump seemingly believed “the war would end within three days.” (!) The Kurdish component is especially revealing. It reflects a fundamental misreading of Iran’s internal dynamics, where an externally backed incursion involving separatist groups would more likely have triggered a nationalist backlash and unified much of the country against a perceived partition threat, rather than spurred mass uprising. In their own telling, Israel invested heavily in influence operation in Iran, fomenting unrest, and regime decapitation, but the core assumption that the system would collapse proved false. Now, after all this, the US is back to negotiations, with the goal of a likely narrower deal focused just on the nuclear file and sanctions relief. The piece ends with: “What started as a far-reaching Israeli move, rich in imagination, final in its solution, ends in heartache.” Link: https://www.ynet.co.il/news/article/yokra14748698#google_vignette - Sina Toossi tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Nuno Felix 你会喜欢这一篇 @Mpolymer 👇 今天以色列 Ynet 刊登了 Nahum Barnea 和 Ronen Bergman 的一篇非常重要的文章，关于伊朗战争中失败的政权更迭计划。它证实了政权更迭是“计划的核心”，由内塔尼亚胡和摩萨德推动，特朗普也参与其中：斩首领导层，煽动抗议，并从西部支持库尔德人的入侵。最引人注目的是他们承认以色列在伊朗的影响力行动变得多么核心。在摩萨德局长 Barnea 的领导下，近年来塑造伊朗公众舆论已成为核心优先事项，在伊朗内部“推动影响力行动”，并有效地将其变成一种“武器系统”，其影响“远超社交媒体”。该策略很明确：从上到下推翻，在“施压高级官员”的同时“并行”地“培养大规模抗议和少数民族的武装抵抗”。文章指出，该行动的“组织”始于四年前，并于两年半前“达到作战成熟度”。文章还承认以色列在 1 月份抗议活动的“背景”中做了“巨大的”工作，这些抗议活动遭到了伊朗当局的暴力镇压，造成数千人死亡，伊朗当局将其描述为外国支持的。政权更迭战争本身就是因为这些抗议活动而提前进行的。战争原定于 6 月进行，但由于情况似乎“成熟”而提前了。然而，至少可以说，结果并不理想。没有大规模起义。没有崩溃。政权“恢复了指挥和控制”，并在策划者显然认为几天内就会结束的行动中幸存下来。更令人震惊的是，文章称美国对伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡感到措手不及，部分原因是特朗普似乎认为“战争将在三天内结束”。（！）库尔德人的部分尤其具有启发性。它反映了对伊朗内部动态的根本性误读，即涉及分裂主义团体的外部支持入侵更有可能引发民族主义反弹，并使该国大部分地区团结起来反对感知到的分裂威胁，而不是引发大规模起义。按照他们自己的说法，以色列在伊朗的影响力行动、煽动动乱和政权斩首上投入了巨资，但系统会崩溃的核心假设被证明是错误的。现在，在经历了这一切之后，美国回到了谈判桌前，目标是达成一项可能更狭窄的协议，仅专注于核档案和制裁减免。文章结尾写道：“以一个富有想象力、解决方案最终的深远以色列行动开始，却以心碎告终。” 链接：https://www.ynet.co.il/news/article/yokra14748698#google_vignette - Sina Toossi 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 The U.S. is tightening the screws on China’s shadow oil network — and Iran is right in the middle of it. Washington has warned banks worldwide: dealing with China’s independent “teapot” refineries now carries serious sanctions risk. These small refineries, mainly in Shandong, are quietly responsible for absorbing nearly 90% of Iran’s total oil exports. According to the Treasury, some of these players are still tapping into the U.S. financial system for dollar transactions — while masking activity through front companies in Asia and the UAE, a shadow tanker fleet, ship-to-ship transfers, and falsified paperwork. Now, financial institutions are being told to dig deeper into any China-linked refinery deals. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 美国正在收紧对中国影子石油网络的控制——而伊朗正处于这一事件的中心。华盛顿已向全球银行发出警告：与中国独立的“茶壶”炼油厂进行交易现在面临严重的制裁风险。这些主要位于山东的小型炼油厂，悄悄承担了伊朗近90%的石油出口总量。据财政部称，其中一些参与者仍在利用美国金融系统进行美元交易——同时通过亚洲和阿联酋的空壳公司、影子油轮船队、船对船转运以及伪造文件来掩盖活动。现在，金融机构被要求深入调查任何与中国炼油厂相关的交易。 推文

text: ▶ Итоги 28 апреля видеосводка от руководителя проекта @rybar Михаила Звинчука специально для @SolovievLive Ситуация в Мали , стремительно испортившаяся за последнее время, остается напряженной — после событий в Кидале под угрозой оказались уже не только Тессалит и Агельхок , но и южные направления. Главный же медиатор конфликта в лице Пакистана сейчас занят разборками с Афганистаном . В зоне СВО российские войска продолжают наступление на Бурлукском , Славянском и Константиновском направлениях — причем на последнем окончательно зачищена Ильиновка . text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Former FBI Director James Comey has been indicted by the Justice Department on two felony counts: knowingly making a threat against the President and transmitting an interstate communication containing a threat to kill the President. Each count carries a maximum sentence of ten years. The charges stem from an Instagram post of seashells spelling “86 47” – a reference some interpret as eliminating (“86”) the 47th president, Donald Trump. Comey deleted the post, saying he did not realise some associate those numbers with violence and that he opposes violence of any kind. Legal analysts have called the indictment “petty”, “retributive” and a “stretch of the imagination”, predicting it will likely be dismissed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 前联邦调查局局长詹姆斯·科米已被司法部起诉，罪名是两项重罪：蓄意威胁总统，以及发送包含杀害总统威胁的州际通讯。每项罪名最高可判处十年监禁。这些指控源于他在Instagram上发布的一张海贝拼写“86 47”的照片——一些人将其解读为清除（“86”）第47任总统唐纳德·特朗普。科米删除了该帖子，称他没有意识到有些人会将这些数字与暴力联系起来，并表示他反对任何形式的暴力。法律分析人士称这项起诉“琐碎”、“报复性”且“牵强附会”，并预测该案很可能会被驳回。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱🇦🇪🇶🇦🇴🇲 The Frozen Ticking Bomb: How Iran has won and lost the Iran War (P.1/prologue of events) On the sunny day of February 28th, U.S. and Israeli aircraft, vessels, and ground systems launched a series of airstrikes starting the “Ramadan War.” Yet…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇦🇪 🇶🇦 🇴🇲 The Frozen Ticking Bomb: How Iran has won and lost the Iran War (P.2 / The victories – what Iran won) With the launch of Iranian strikes targeting the Gulf and the region entirely, for the first time in modern times since the era of the Arab-Israeli wars, the Middle East was fully consumed by the flame of fury that war brought with it. Gulf oil and gas infrastructure sites were targeted across the region, and production in many of the world's largest plants either completely stopped or reduced. The Iranian missile or drone saw no difference between a Kuwaiti air base, a Qatari gas complex, or an Omani port. Iran also benefited greatly from this scheme with U.S. Treasury waivers allowing the sale of sanctioned oil with exports peaking at over 2 million barrels, becoming one of Iran's biggest financial victories second only to its plan of monopolizing transit through the Strait of Hormuz, which grants a permanent stream of revenue while also creating dependence on Iran for the strait. A parallel to the world's canals such as the Suez or Panama, which harbor and channel the world's trade and logistic supply lines. Iran's military and civilian cohesion is another fundamental victory. It remained steadfast and prepared with no cracks internally thanks to its strong security apparatus, allowing the government to stay in control, leverage state media, and wage the internet shutdown to successfully dominate the narrative domestically. Internationally, Iran also largely won the narrative war, with state-aligned media outlets and agencies successfully broadcasting the state's agenda. Whether this cohesion survives the coming inflation and reconstruction remains an open question, but for now, it held. Iran also saw great success in culling the region, inducing fear using its drones and military. Iran's media and affiliates also wagered this using Israeli-style evacuation warnings for critical infrastructure and at times civilian sites. Iran also saw a major achievement in damaging the U.S. reputation as a shield and barrier against Iranian attacks, as many U.S. bases — even in the largely unaffected Saudi Arabia — were damaged for years to come, with billions in dollars of losses. This comes without mentioning U.S. military failures in destroying Iranian missile bases, which are now coming back online steadily over time. Its military infrastructure is still largely intact and its nuclear program unfettered overall. Iran's regional proxies in particular proved their worth. Iraqi groups succeeded in targeting U.S.-affiliated sites and Iranian opposition groups, while also heavily damaging the U.S. Victoria Air Base at Baghdad Airport. Yemen once again became a critical "what‑if" factor, with the Bab el‑Mandeb Strait and intermittent launches toward Israel. Hezbollah, for its part, performed well overall, stretching Israeli forces thin and pulling away resources. Yet these gains did not come without losses. Israel decisively succeeded against Hezbollah during the hot phase of the conflict, though a ceasefire in Lebanon has since allowed Hezbollah to regroup and push back incrementally. In Iraq, U.S. airstrikes damaged key bases and killed a significant number of Iraqi PMF personnel, further eroding Iran's proxy network. On balance, the proxies delivered tactical disruptions but fell short of a strategic knockout, and their long-term viability remains tied to the unresolved question of resupply. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱🇦🇪🇶🇦🇴🇲 冰封的定时炸弹：伊朗如何赢得并输掉了伊朗战争（第一部分/事件序幕）在2月28日阳光明媚的一天，美国和以色列的飞机、舰船和地面系统发动了一系列空袭，开启了‘斋月战争’。然而……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇦🇪 🇶🇦 🇴🇲 冰封的定时炸弹：伊朗如何赢得并输掉了伊朗战争（第二部分/胜利——伊朗赢得了什么）随着伊朗针对海湾地区及整个地区发动袭击，自阿拉伯-以色列战争时代以来，中东现代史上首次完全被战争带来的愤怒火焰所吞噬。海湾地区的石油和天然气基础设施站点在整个地区遭到袭击，世界上许多大型工厂的生产要么完全停止，要么减少。伊朗的导弹或无人机对科威特空军基地、卡塔尔天然气综合设施或阿曼港口一视同仁。伊朗也从这一计划中获益匪浅，美国财政部的豁免允许其出售受制裁的石油，出口量达到每天超过200万桶的峰值，这成为伊朗仅次于其垄断霍尔木兹海峡过境计划的第二大金融胜利，该计划在提供永久收入流的同时，也使海峡对伊朗产生了依赖。这与苏伊士运河或巴拿马运河等世界运河相提并论，它们承载并引导着世界的贸易和物流供应线。伊朗的军事和民事凝聚力是另一项根本性的胜利。得益于其强大的安全机构，它保持坚定并做好准备，内部没有出现裂痕，使政府能够保持控制、利用国家媒体并实施互联网封锁，从而成功在国内主导了叙事。在国际上，伊朗也在很大程度上赢得了叙事战争，与国家结盟的媒体和机构成功地传播了国家的议程。这种凝聚力能否在未来的通货膨胀和重建中存续仍是一个悬而未决的问题，但目前它确实保持住了。伊朗在震慑该地区方面也取得了巨大成功，利用其无人机和军事力量制造恐惧。伊朗的媒体和附属机构也利用这一点，针对关键基础设施甚至有时是民用场所发布了以色列式的撤离警告。伊朗在损害美国作为抵御伊朗袭击的盾牌和屏障的声誉方面也取得了重大成就，因为许多美国基地——即使是在很大程度上未受影响的沙特阿拉伯——也遭受了未来数年的破坏，损失达数十亿美元。这还不包括美国在摧毁伊朗导弹基地方面的军事失败，这些基地现在正随着时间的推移稳步恢复运行。其军事基础设施在很大程度上仍然完好无损，其核计划总体上未受阻碍。伊朗在该地区的代理人尤其证明了他们的价值。伊拉克组织成功地袭击了与美国有关的地点和伊朗反对派团体，同时也严重破坏了巴格达机场的美国维多利亚空军基地。也门再次成为一个关键的“假设”因素，曼德海峡和对以色列的间歇性发射就是证明。真主党方面总体表现良好，分散了以色列的兵力并牵制了资源。然而，这些收益并非没有损失。以色列在冲突的激烈阶段成功地对真主党取得了决定性胜利，尽管黎巴嫩的停火协议此后允许真主党重组并逐步反击。在伊拉克，美国的空袭破坏了关键基地并杀死了大量伊拉克人民动员组织（PMF）人员，进一步削弱了伊朗的代理人网络。总的来说，代理人造成了战术上的破坏，但未能实现战略上的击溃，其长期生存能力仍然与悬而未决的补给问题挂钩。@wfwitness

text: ⭕️ دفاعًا عن لبنان وشعبه، وردًّا على خرق العدوّ الإسرائيليّ لوقف إطلاق النار، والإعتداء على المدنيّين وتدمير بيوتهم وقراهم في جنوب لبنان، واستنادًا إلى الحقّ في مقاومة الاحتلال ودحره، أصدرت المقاومة الإسلامية بتاريخ الثلاثاء 28/04/2026، 6 بيانات عسكرية وفقًا للآتي: 1- الساعة 13:00 ردًا على هدم البيوت في قرى جنوب لبنان، استهدف مجاهدو المُقاومة الإسلاميّة جرّافة عسكريّة إسرائيليّة أثناء قيامها بهدم البيوت في مدينة بنت جبيل بمحلّقة انقضاضيّة وحقّقوا إصابة مؤكّدة. 2- الساعة 13:00 ردًا على الاعتداءات التي طالت القرى في جنوب لبنان وأسفرت عن ارتقاء شهداء وعدد من الجرحى بين المدنيّين، استهدف مجاهدو المُقاومة الإسلاميّة تجمّعًا لجنود جيش العدوّ الإسرائيليّ في ساحة بلدة القنطرة بمحلّقة انقضاضيّة وحقّقوا إصابة مؤكّدة. 3- الساعة 14:00 ردًا على الاعتداءات التي طالت القرى وهدم البيوت في جنوب لبنان، استهدف مجاهدو المُقاومة الإسلاميّة دبّابة ميركافا في ساحة بلدة القنطرة بمحلّقة انقضاضيّة وحقّقوا إصابة مؤكّدة. 4- الساعة 18:10 ردًا على استباحته الأجواء اللبنانيّة، أسقط مجاهدو المُقاومة الإسلاميّة طائرة مسيّرة تابعة لجيش العدوّ الإسرائيليّ من نوع "هرمز 900" في أجواء بلدة القنطرة بصاروخ أرض جو. 5- الساعة 18:30 ردًا على الاعتداءات التي طالت القرى في جنوب لبنان وأسفرت عن ارتقاء شهداء وعدد من الجرحى بين المدنيّين، استهدف مجاهدو المُقاومة الإسلاميّة تجمّعًا لجنود جيش العدوّ الإسرائيليّ في بلدة الطيبة بسربٍ من المسيّرات الانقضاضيّة. 6- الساعة 23:20 ردًا على الاعتداءات التي طالت القرى في جنوب لبنان وأسفرت عن ارتقاء شهداء وعدد من الجرحى بين المدنيّين، استهدف مجاهدو المُقاومة الإسلاميّة تجمّعًا لجنود جيش العدوّ الإسرائيليّ في موقع نمر الجمل المستحدث بسربٍ من المسيّرات الانقضاضيّة وحقّقوا إصابة مؤكدة. إنّ المقاومة الاسلاميّة معنيّة بالدفاع عن أرضها وشعبها خصوصًا مع تجاوز العدو الإسرائيلي الحدود بإجرامه، وهذا أقل الواجب للجمه ومنعه من التمادي في أهدافه الخطيرة على لبنان دولةً وشعباً ومقاومة. #معركة_العصف_المأكول #دفاعا_عن_لبنان_وشعبه #الإعلام_الحربي
text_zh: ⭕️ 为了保卫黎巴嫩及其人民，回应以色列敌军违反停火协议、袭击平民并摧毁黎巴嫩南部房屋和村庄的行为，基于抵抗占领和击退侵略的权利，伊斯兰抵抗组织于2026年4月28日星期二发布了6份军事声明，内容如下： 1- 13:00，为回应在黎巴嫩南部村庄拆毁房屋的行为，伊斯兰抵抗组织的战士使用自杀式无人机袭击了一辆正在宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）市拆毁房屋的以色列军用推土机，并取得了确切命中。 2- 13:00，为回应针对黎巴嫩南部村庄并导致平民伤亡的袭击，伊斯兰抵抗组织的战士使用自杀式无人机袭击了坎塔拉（Qantara）镇广场上的以色列敌军士兵集结地，并取得了确切命中。 3- 14:00，为回应针对村庄的袭击和在黎巴嫩南部拆毁房屋的行为，伊斯兰抵抗组织的战士使用自杀式无人机袭击了坎塔拉（Qantara）镇广场上的一辆梅卡瓦坦克，并取得了确切命中。 4- 18:10，为回应其对黎巴嫩领空的侵犯，伊斯兰抵抗组织的战士在坎塔拉（Qantara）镇上空使用地对空导弹击落了一架以色列敌军的“赫尔墨斯900”（Hermes 900）无人机。 5- 18:30，为回应针对黎巴嫩南部村庄并导致平民伤亡的袭击，伊斯兰抵抗组织的战士使用一群自杀式无人机袭击了泰比（Taybeh）镇的以色列敌军士兵集结地。 6- 23:20，为回应针对黎巴嫩南部村庄并导致平民伤亡的袭击，伊斯兰抵抗组织的战士使用一群自杀式无人机袭击了新建的尼姆尔贾迈勒（Nimr al-Jamal）阵地上的以色列敌军士兵集结地，并取得了确切命中。伊斯兰抵抗组织致力于保卫其土地和人民，特别是在以色列敌军的罪行越界的情况下。这是遏制敌军并阻止其继续对黎巴嫩国家、人民和抵抗力量实施危险目标的最低限度义务。 #暴风雨之战 #保卫黎巴嫩及其人民 #战争媒体

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : #BREAKING 🇦🇪 The United Arab Emirates, the third-largest oil producer in OPEC, has announced it will leave OPEC and OPEC+ starting May 1. 🛢️ This move would free the UAE from production quotas, allowing it to: ▪️ Increase oil output to full capacity ▪️ Set its own export strategy ▪️ Price crude independently of group restrictions 🟦 The decision could boost UAE production, strengthen state revenues, and put downward pressure on global oil prices. ▪️ Lower prices and increased supply would likely align with President Trump’s long-standing calls for cheaper energy and criticism of OPEC limits. 🟥 Amid rising tensions with Iran, the UAE’s exit could act as a strategic buffer for the global economy: 🟦 Around 20% of global oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz, which Iran has repeatedly threatened to close. ▪️ The UAE, however, can bypass Hormuz via the Habshan–Fujairah pipeline, exporting oil directly to the Gulf of Oman. Freed from OPEC quotas, it could maximize output through this route, weakening Iran’s leverage over global supply. ▪️ In the event of renewed conflict, sanctions, or infrastructure strikes, Iran’s oil exports — largely dependent on China — could collapse. 🔺 The UAE, with significant spare capacity, could quickly offset supply losses, preventing extreme price spikes (e.g. $150–200 per barrel) that would damage Western economies. 🔹 Reduced OPEC coordination would also limit Iran’s ability to influence global markets through price manipulation. 🇨🇳 China, a major buyer of Iranian oil, could be forced to shift toward UAE supplies, further isolating Tehran economically. 🔺 If Iran physically blocks Hormuz, the UAE’s pipeline system becomes critical: ▪️ It can transport 1.5–1.8 million barrels per day — over half of UAE exports ▪️ Tankers can load outside the Strait, reducing risk and insurance costs 🔺 Fujairah, located outside Hormuz, offers a safer and cheaper export hub compared to Gulf ports dependent on the Strait. text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 : #突发 🇦🇪 作为欧佩克（OPEC）第三大石油生产国，阿拉伯联合酋长国宣布将于5月1日起退出欧佩克及欧佩克+。 🛢️ 此举将使阿联酋摆脱生产配额限制，从而能够： ▪️ 将石油产量提高至满负荷 ▪️ 制定自己的出口战略 ▪️ 在集团限制之外独立定价原油 🟦 此决定可能提振阿联酋产量，增加国家收入，并对全球油价产生下行压力。 ▪️ 更低的价格和增加的供应可能符合特朗普总统长期以来对廉价能源的呼吁以及对欧佩克限制的批评。 🟥 在与伊朗紧张局势加剧的背景下，阿联酋的退出可能成为全球经济的战略缓冲： 🟦 全球约20%的石油流经霍尔木兹海峡，伊朗已多次威胁要关闭该海峡。 ▪️ 然而，阿联酋可以通过哈布山-富查伊拉（Habshan–Fujairah）管道绕过霍尔木兹海峡，直接向阿曼湾出口石油。摆脱欧佩克配额后，它可以最大限度地通过该路线提高产量，从而削弱伊朗对全球供应的影响力。 ▪️ 如果发生新的冲突、制裁或基础设施袭击，主要依赖中国的伊朗石油出口可能会崩溃。 🔺 阿联酋拥有巨大的闲置产能，可以迅速抵消供应损失，防止可能损害西方经济的极端价格飙升（例如每桶150-200美元）。 🔹 减少欧佩克的协调也将限制伊朗通过价格操纵影响全球市场的能力。 🇨🇳 作为伊朗石油的主要买家，中国可能被迫转向阿联酋供应，从而在经济上进一步孤立德黑兰。 🔺 如果伊朗物理封锁霍尔木兹海峡，阿联酋的管道系统将变得至关重要： ▪️ 它每天可输送150万至180万桶石油，超过阿联酋出口量的一半 ▪️ 油轮可以在海峡外装载，降低风险和保险成本 🔺 位于霍尔木兹海峡之外的富查伊拉，与依赖海峡的海湾港口相比，提供了一个更安全、更廉价的出口枢纽。视频由grok AI推文生成
